chat.moderation_blocked: <red>Your message was blocked by chat moderation.

proxy.limbo.chat_limited: <#94a3b8>Chat is limited while you are held in proxy limbo.</#94a3b8> <#94a3b8>Use <#e2e8f0>/play <mode></#e2e8f0> from the live mode suggestions, or stay connected and the proxy will route you automatically.</#94a3b8>
proxy.limbo.unknown_command: <#fbbf24>Unknown limbo command.</#fbbf24> <#94a3b8>Try <#e2e8f0>/play lobby</#e2e8f0>, <#e2e8f0>/play extraction</#e2e8f0>, or <#e2e8f0>/queue status</#e2e8f0>.</#94a3b8>
social.auto_translate_desc: Translate chat into your client language.
